title: SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES - 211info
text: 211INFO SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Severe weather shelters may be activated when certain weather criteria are met. Criteria varies by shelter. Information for seasonal winter shelters and year-round shelters is also available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: November 1-March 31 each year. Hours vary. Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Main phone 211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Cold Weather Advisories Community Shelters Extreme Cold Warming Centers Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY FOOD - 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
